description_long: This is an ornate necklace featuring three large, oval-shaped pendants arranged vertically and connected by a delicate chain. Each pendant is encrusted with numerous small, sparkling stones, giving the piece a highly decorative and luxurious appearance. The chain appears to be made of fine metal links, likely gold or gold-plated, and is attached to the topmost pendant, draping elegantly around the neck. The pendants are graduated in size, with the largest at the top and the smallest at the bottom, creating a cascading effect. The overall design is bold and eye-catching, suitable for formal or special occasions. The craftsmanship suggests a focus on intricate detailing and a geometric motif.
description: A luxurious, gold-toned necklace with three vertically aligned, stone-encrusted oval pendants connected by a fine chain. The design is ornate and highly decorative, ideal for statement wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full necklace with three prominent, sparkling oval pendants and the fine chain draped around the neck.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the pendants and the way the chain curves around the display form.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals only the chain encircling the neck, with the pendants not visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the pendants and the chain's drape.
